services.title: Speech and Language Therapy
services.description: We provide individualized support to enhance communication skills, language development, and speech clarity.
services.details:
Helping You Find Your Voice

We provide individualized support to enhance communication skills, language development, and speech clarity. Our therapy programs are tailored to meet the unique needs of each individual, ensuring steady progress in a supportive environment.

Key Benefits:

- Improved speech clarity
- Enhanced communication skills
- Personalized therapy plans
- Support for all age groups

services.title: Occupational Therapy
services.description: Helping individuals develop essential life skills for better independence and daily functioning.
services.details:
Our Occupational Therapy focuses on improving motor skills, sensory processing, and everyday activities like dressing, eating, and self-care. We provide personalized therapy plans in a supportive environment to help each individual reach their full potential.

- Personalized Therapy Plans tailored to individual goals
- Experienced & Certified Therapists
- Child-Friendly & Supportive Environment
- Holistic Development Approach

services.title: Remedial Education (Subject-wise)
services.description: Subject-wise learning programs are designed to strengthen fundamentals, clear doubts, and improve overall academic outcomes.
services.details:
We offer focused academic support tailored to each subject.

Description:
Subject-wise learning programs are designed to strengthen fundamentals, clear doubts, and improve overall academic outcomes.

Beyond academics, we help students grow holistically.
Activities and sessions designed to enhance critical thinking, communication, and problem-solving skills.

Every child learns differently, and we respect that.

Description:
Customized lesson plans based on individual strengths and weaknesses to ensure effective learning.

services.title: Special Education Support
services.description: Every child’s learning journey is unique. We provide structured and personalized intervention plans tailored to meet each learner’s developmental and educational needs.
services.details:
Our Services:

- Individualized Learning Programs
- Behavioral & Skill Development Support
- Inclusive Classroom Strategies
- One-on-One Guidance
- Progress Monitoring & Parent Support

Age Group: 3+ to 17 years
Timings: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM

Why Choose Us?

- Experienced Educators
- Child-Centered Approach
- Safe & Supportive Environment
- Focus on Holistic Development

services.title: Pre-Vocational Computer Course with Personality Development – The Sensorium
services.description: This course is designed to build essential digital skills, confidence, and professional abilities needed in today’s world.
services.details:
It is thoughtfully created for special needs and neurodiverse students, providing a safe, supportive, and inclusive learning environment.

The program combines practical computer training with personality development and communication skills to prepare students for real-world opportunities. With trained facilitators and personalized attention, learning is adapted to each student’s pace and strengths.

Key Features:

- Practical computer and digital skills training
- Inclusive program for neurodiverse learners
- Individualized learning and personal attention
- Personality development for confidence building
- Communication classes for spoken and professional English
- Interactive, activity-based learning approach
- Career-oriented training with placement guidance

Timings: 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM

This program helps students become confident, independent, and job-ready individuals in a supportive setting.

services.title: Day Care Services – The Sensorium
services.description: Our Day Care Center provides a safe, comfortable, and caring environment where children receive proper care and attention throughout the day.
services.details:
With trained staff, guided activities, and personalized support, we ensure every child feels happy, secure, and engaged.

Facilities:

- Fully air-conditioned environment
- Clean and comfortable beds for rest
- Tuition classes for academic support
- Fun learning activities and skill development programs
- Safe and child-friendly atmosphere

Timings:
8:30 AM to 6:00 PM

The Sensorium is the perfect place for working parents, where children can learn, rest, and grow in a secure and nurturing environment.
